overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious cyberpunk penthouse apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit interiors with cyan and red accents, modern furniture, a holographic display table, and a distinctive four-armed statue holding glowing orbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse living room with holographic centerpiece

events.description: passing the holographic display table, moving deeper into the living room

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit living room toward the back of the space

entered.detail: glowing blue spherical hologram hovering above a low table
curved modern sofa with red neon accent lighting along the base
matching curved sofa with red neon trim facing the hologram
hexagonal ceiling light emitting bright cyan illumination
large window with red neon lighting visible through the glass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a luxurious cyberpunk living room dominated by cyan and red neon lighting. A holographic sphere glows above a central table between two modern sofas. The camera walks steadily forward, passing the seating area and approaching a glass structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with glass elevator shaft and bamboo garden

events.description: transitioning from living room into corridor with glass-walled elevator shaft containing bamboo plants

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor past the glass elevator structure

entered.detail: transparent glass elevator shaft with cyan neon framing containing tall bamboo plants
tall green bamboo stalks visible inside the glass elevator shaft

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow corridor featuring a glass elevator shaft with bamboo plants inside, illuminated by cyan neon edges. The living room furniture falls behind as the space transitions to a more enclosed gallery-like area, with a multi-armed statue becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: art gallery with multi-armed statue and dining area

events.description: approaching the four-armed statue holding glowing purple spheres in a glass display case
passing the statue and entering the dining area with set table

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the multi-armed statue closely before moving toward the dining area

entered.detail: futuristic four-armed humanoid sculpture holding glowing purple spheres, wearing a golden lower garment
transparent enclosure surrounding the multi-armed statue with purple accent lighting
rectangular dining table set with plates, napkins, and candles under warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an impressive four-armed statue holding glowing purple orbs, enclosed in a glass case with dramatic lighting. Moving past the sculpture, the scene opens into a dining area with an elegantly set table visible through a doorway, transitioning from the gallery space to a more intimate dining room with warm overhead lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk living space that transitions from an open lounge into an intimate dining area. It begins in a luxurious room dominated by cyan and red lighting, gliding past modern sofas and a glowing holographic sphere toward a distant glass structure. As the camera moves forward, the space narrows into a corridor featuring a glass elevator shaft lined with bamboo and cyan neon edges, shifting the atmosphere from an open lounge to an enclosed gallery. The scene then focuses on a dramatic glass case housing a four-armed statue with glowing purple orbs before the camera passes the sculpture and moves through a doorway. Finally, the environment opens into a dining room, where the cool neon tones give way to the warm overhead lighting of an elegantly set table.
